---
title: "Dr Elisha Kent Kane M.D."
---

## Dr Elisha Kent Kane M.D.

**Dates:** (1820-1857)

### Description

physician, Arctic explorer

### Biography

CMY included Dr Kane in <i>A Book of Golden Deeds</i> though she calls him Dr. Edward Kane.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 29th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
